name: De-coding Armageddon
short_description: Fast paste, fast typing, arcade, die and retry game. De-coding Armageddon is a game to practice your speed and reflexes, perfect for when you are waiting on another game or wether you just wanna kill sometime.
detailed_description:
-Game-

Stay alert for the missiles that come to destroy the earth and their codes to deactivate them. You will have to write the code corresponding to each missile to deactivate it so that it does not impact. The longer you hold on, the faster they will go. Good luck.

-Controls-

To write the codes, use the W-A-S-D or arrow keys, to confirm or delete the ENTER or SPACEBAR combination, and to move through the menus and select with the mouse and left click. 

-Characteristics-

An endless game, easy to learn, simple controls, challenging and fast.

At the end of each game you will earn points based on the missiles destroyed. Accumulate these points to unlock color palettes to enjoy the game in different styles.
